Deprecated API

Contents

  • For Removal
  • Methods
  • Enum Constants
  • For Removal 
    Element Description
    io.mangoo.core.Config.isApplicationMinifyCSS()
    io.mangoo.core.Config.isApplicationMinifyJS()
    io.mangoo.enums.Default.APPLICATION_MINIFY_CSS
    io.mangoo.enums.Default.APPLICATION_MINIFY_JS
    io.mangoo.enums.Key.APPLICATION_MINIFY_CSS
    io.mangoo.enums.Key.APPLICATION_MINIFY_JS
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.MAX
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.MAX_KEY
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.MIN
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.MIN_KEY
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.RANGE
    io.mangoo.enums.Validation.RANGE_KEY
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.expectMax​(String, double)
    Use Validator.expectMaxLength(String, double) or Validator.expectMaxValue(String, double) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.expectMin​(String, double)
    Use Validator.expectMinValue(String, double) or Validator.expectMinLength(String, double) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.expectRange​(String, int, int)
    Use Validator.expectRangeLength(String, int, int) or Validator.expectRangeValue(String, int, int) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateFalse​(boolean, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectFalse(String, boolean, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateNotNull​(Object, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectNotNull(String, Object, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateNull​(Object, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectNull(String, Object, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateTrue​(boolean, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectTrue(String, boolean, String) instead
    io.mangoo.utils.CodecUtils.checkJBCrypt​(String, String)
    Use hashArgon2 instead
    io.mangoo.utils.CodecUtils.hexJBcrypt​(String)
    Use hashArgon2 instead
    io.mangoo.utils.CodecUtils.hexSHA512​(String, String)

    Use Validator.expectMinValue(String, double) or Validator.expectMinLength(String, double) instead

    Use Validator.expectRangeLength(String, int, int) or Validator.expectRangeValue(String, int, int) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateFalse​(boolean, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectFalse(String, boolean, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateNotNull​(Object, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectNotNull(String, Object, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateNull​(Object, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectNull(String, Object, String) instead
    io.mangoo.routing.bindings.Validator.validateTrue​(boolean, String, String)
    Use Validator.expectTrue(String, boolean, String) instead
    io.mangoo.utils.CodecUtils.checkJBCrypt​(String, String)
    Use hashArgon2 instead
    io.mangoo.utils.CodecUtils.hexJBcrypt​(String)
    Use hashArgon2 instead
